channel.title: Home on ajkrTERM
channel.description: Recent content in Home on ajkrTERM

item.title: 2023 Yearly Update
item.description: This is the first of my yearly updates on this new personal blog I built. I hope to make many more of these in the coming years.

item.title: Changelog
item.description: 01-01-2023 New hugo powered blog website launched on GitHub Pages

item.title: Notes
item.description: 👾 *beep boop* site under construction. Return home.

item.title: Whoami
item.description: Hi! I am Ajinkya, a machine learning engineer at Sensity. With over 3 years of industry experience in the field of computer vision and natural language processing, I am experienced in building end-to-end ML solutions, ranging from model training to model deployment. You can find me on GitHub and Twitter. Skills Languages Python GoLang (beta mode) Tech Stack Docker GCP Kubernetes (beta mode)
